name: io.github.printrfi/printr
description: MCP server for Printr — lets AI agents create, discover, and track tokens across chains. No API key required.

environmentVariables.description: Partner API key. Falls back to the default public AI-integration key.
environmentVariables.name: PRINTR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Enables auto image generation and the printr_generate_image tool
environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Default EVM private key for autonomous signing
environmentVariables.name: EVM_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Default Solana keypair secret for autonomous signing
environmentVariables.name: SVM_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
